name: chzzk
description: Personal Firefox WebExtension project for CHZZK high-quality playback selection.

scripts.build: npm run bundle:inject && web-ext build --overwrite-dest --artifacts-dir dist --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes docs node_modules package-lock.json package.json scripts src tests
scripts.check:generated: npm run bundle:inject && git diff --exit-code inject.js
scripts.lint:webext: web-ext lint --warnings-as-errors --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes docs node_modules package-lock.json package.json scripts src tests
scripts.verify: npm run bundle:inject && npm run validate:manifest && npm run lint && npm run lint:webext && npm run test && npm run build
